name: Waialae Nui Ridge
desc: Prestigious ridge homes above Kahala — sweeping Diamond Head and ocean views, large lots, exclusive addresses.
insider: The ridge road has pulloffs where you can park and get incredible free panoramic photos — Diamond Head, Koko Head, and the coastline
Morning fog rolls through frequently — when it clears, the view reveal is one of the most dramatic on Oahu
Homeowners here are very privacy-conscious — don't wander into driveways or linger on private roads
The walk down to Kahala Mall takes about 15 minutes — good cardio going back up the steep grade
Homes routinely sell for $2M-5M+ — the combination of views, lot size, and Kahala address commands a premium
The ridge catches more trade wind than the valley below — natural AC but secure outdoor furniture and umbrellas
There are no sidewalks — residents walk in the street, which is fine given how little traffic there is
The exclusive feel comes at the cost of total car dependence — nothing is walkable except neighbors' houses
Sunrise views of Koko Head crater from the eastern ridge lots are particularly stunning
The neighborhood was developed in the 1950s-60s — some original homes remain but many have been rebuilt to maximize the views
